title: Lead Investment Banker at Oriental Insurance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Oriental Insurance
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Oriental Insurance in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Oriental Insurance:
Oriental Insurance is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oriental Insurance!
